title: Database Connection Exhaustion
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
10:01 db ERROR too many connections
10:02 payment ERROR timeout acquiring db connection
10:03 checkout ERROR payment failed
10:04 gateway ERROR 502
10:04 gateway ERROR 502
10:04 gateway ERROR 502
common_mistake: Choosing gateway because it has the most repeated errors.

title: Redis Memory Exhaustion
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
11:01 redis ERROR maxmemory limit reached
11:02 api ERROR connection refused
11:03 frontend ERROR 503
11:03 frontend ERROR 503
11:03 frontend ERROR 503
common_mistake: Choosing frontend because it has the most repeated errors.

title: Missing Environment Variable
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
12:00 deploy INFO auth-service version v2.3.1
12:01 auth ERROR missing env var JWT_SECRET
12:02 auth ERROR failed to start
12:03 gateway WARN 401 spike
expected_answer: Missing JWT_SECRET environment variable after deployment
common_mistake: Treating the 401 spike as the primary cause.

title: Bad Feature Flag
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
13:00 deploy INFO checkout-service version v4.1.0
13:01 checkout ERROR unknown feature flag CHECKOUT_V2
13:02 checkout ERROR failed request
13:03 gateway ERROR 500
expected_answer: Unknown CHECKOUT_V2 feature flag after deployment
common_mistake: Blaming the gateway 500 instead of the deployment/config clue.

title: Inventory Timeout Retry Storm
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
14:00 inventory ERROR timeout
14:01 checkout WARN retry attempt 1
14:01 checkout WARN retry attempt 2
14:01 checkout WARN retry attempt 3
14:02 queue WARN depth increasing
14:03 api ERROR rate limit exceeded
expected_answer: Inventory timeout caused retry amplification and queue growth
common_mistake: Blaming the API rate limit without noticing retries and queue growth.

title: Email Service Slowdown Retry Storm
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
15:00 email-service WARN slow response
15:01 notification-service WARN retry attempt 1
15:01 notification-service WARN retry attempt 2
15:02 queue WARN backlog rising
15:03 notification-service ERROR rate limit exceeded
expected_answer: Email service slowdown caused retry amplification and backlog growth
common_mistake: Blaming rate limiting without noticing retry storm behavior.

title: Ambiguous Timeout
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
16:00 api ERROR request timeout
16:01 frontend ERROR failed request
16:02 gateway ERROR 504
expected_answer: Insufficient evidence; ask for deployment logs, dependency logs, and fuller timing
common_mistake: Overclaiming that the API is the root cause.
target_skill: Ask for Missing Evidence Before Guessing

title: Ambiguous Authentication Failure
task: Find the likely cause of this incident.
input_text:
17:00 api ERROR authentication failed
17:01 frontend WARN login failed
17:02 gateway WARN 401 increased
expected_answer: Insufficient evidence; ask for auth-service logs, deployment events, or secret rotation history
common_mistake: Overclaiming that the API is broken.
target_skill: Ask for Missing Evidence Before Guessing
